## react-provider package

This is a sample package

## Functions


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  Function | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  createContextHook(contextName, options) | Create a react context but more powerful. There are 2 modes - strict: true - There is no defaultValue, parent must provider the value. - strict: false - The behavior is the same as react context. |
|  createGlobalConfig(name, defaultValue) | 创建一个全局配置 |
|  createLocaleProvider({ defaultLocale, }) |  |
|  createStore(defaultValue) | 创建一个 mini store |
|  enhanceDateAdapter(baseAdapter) | 具体事件库的 utils 只提供最基础的原子方法 我们会在原子方法至上，组合出更多方便使用的方法 |
|  getGlobalLocaleName() | 获取全局区域名称 |
|  setGlobalLocaleName(value) | 设置全局区域名称 |
|  UDStylesheetContainerProvider(props) |  |
|  useDateAdapter() |  |
|  useDomainEventTargetContext() | <code>useDomainEventTargetContext</code> is a hook to get the nearest parent event target. You can dispatch events using the event target returned. |
|  useEmotionCache() |  |
|  useLocaleName(propValue) | 获取当前区域名称的 react hook |
|  usePopupPortalContainer() |  |
|  useUDTheme() |  |
